overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character paddling a canoe through a forested river system, navigating calm waters and rocky rapids in a wilderness environment with dense pine forests and rocky outcrops.

events.description: water current increases as canoe approaches rocky section

agents.ego_description: paddling canoe steadily downstream through calm waters, approaching rocky area

entered.detail: calm greenish river water with gentle ripples
dense pine forest lining the riverbank
dense pine forest lining the riverbank
large boulders emerging from the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a canoe through a calm, forested river. The water is relatively still as the character paddles forward, with dense pine forests visible on both banks. Large rocks begin to appear in the water ahead, signaling an approaching rapids section.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river rapids with canyon walls

events.description: entering narrow rocky rapids section with faster water
canoe speeds up navigating through the rapids current

agents.ego_description: navigating canoe through rocky rapids, paddling to steer between large boulders

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon wall rising from the river
steep rocky canyon wall rising from the river

segments.scene_description: The canoe enters a narrow, rocky section of the river with faster-moving water and white rapids. Steep rocky cliffs rise on both sides, partially obscuring the forest. The character paddles actively to navigate between large boulders that emerge prominently from the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide river basin with open shores

events.description: exiting rapids into wide calm section of the river
character turns canoe to the left to explore side channel

agents.ego_description: paddling in a wide arc to turn the canoe around and explore the river basin

entered.detail: prominent boulder outcrop on the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The canoe emerges from the rapids into a wide, calm basin with open skies. The water becomes smooth and reflective. The character executes a wide turning maneuver, paddling to the left to explore the area, revealing gravel riverbanks and a large rock formation on the right shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested river channel with scattered rocks

events.description: canoe straightens out and continues downstream
approaching another section of river rocks

agents.ego_description: paddling steadily downstream through the main river channel, navigating around scattered rocks

entered.detail: cluster of boulders in the river ahead

segments.scene_description: The canoe straightens out and continues down the main river channel through a densely forested area. The character paddles steadily, navigating around scattered rocks in the water. The river flows between tree-lined banks, with the camera following smoothly from behind as the journey continues downstream.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a canoe travels from a tranquil forested river through turbulent rapids and into an open basin. It begins with the vessel gliding through still waters flanked by dense pine forests, where the appearance of large rocks signals a transition into a more volatile stretch of the river. As the water accelerates, the scene shifts into a narrow gorge of white rapids and steep rocky cliffs, requiring active paddling to navigate between prominent boulders. The canoe then emerges from the chaos into a wide, reflective basin under open skies, where the character executes a wide turn to reveal gravel banks and a large rock formation. Finally, the river narrows once more as the camera follows the boat steadily downstream through a densely forested channel lined with scattered rocks.
